title: Section 7A
content: 1[7A. Sections 5 and 7 not to apply to Ayurvedic, Siddha or Unani drugs.--Nothing contained in sections 5 and 7 shall apply to 2[Ayurvedic, Siddha or Unani] drugs.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 13 of 1964, s. 6 (w.e.f. 15-9-1964). 2. Subs. by Act 68 of 1982, s. 2, for certain words (w.e.f. 1-2-1983).
